mapper.sql: select p.id as profile_id, u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.phonenumber, coalesce(nullif(p.gender, ''), u.sex) as sex, p.age, p.voice_file, p.tongue_image, p.face_image, u.create_time, p.update_time, coalesce(p.update_time, p.create_time) as collect_time, p.remark from tcm_app_user_profile p left join sys_user u on u.user_id = p.user_id
mapper.select:
u.del_flag = '0' and u.user_id = #{userId}
and (u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%') or u.nick_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%'))
and (u.phonenumber like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%') or u.user_name like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%'))
and date_format(u.create_time,'%y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%y%m%d')
and date_format(u.create_time,'%y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%y%m%d')
order by coalesce(p.update_time, p.create_time) desc
mapper.insert: insert into tcm_app_user_profile ( user_id, gender, age, voice_file, tongue_image, face_image, remark, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{sex}, #{age}, #{voiceFile}, #{tongueImage}, #{faceImage}, #{remark}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update gender = values(gender), age = values(age), voice_file = values(voice_file), tongue_image = values(tongue_image), face_image = values(face_image), remark = values(remark), update_time = sysdate()
